title: hesperis preauxiana
intro: Hesperis preauxiana, also known as Cornflower or Corn Cockle, is a biennial flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hesperis preauxiana include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Hesperis preauxiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions or as a natural remedy for relaxation and sleep aid.
